title: Smoothie
lyrics: Up, down, round and round Up, down, round and round girl Yeah, just up, down Up, down, round Smooth When you make it go up, down, round and round Baby, you're so smooth When you make it go up, down, round and round Girl, you know you're smooth Making it go up, down, round, round Yeah, you're so smooth When you make me go Ooh, love I see a baby there in the club No one came with you, you wanna rub a dub You say you're just single damn mingling Like to dance by yourself But I said, hey, come on You could use me as a friend in your life I got the game, you pack up the stripes Bring a little bit of cheddar scraps there And then maybe make a kitchen for me and we'll go there I don't need you to be scared There's no fear inside of me Cause from what I've seen You got a reason for me to stay right next to you Cause girl, you're smooth Yeah, right next to you Now I take one look at the back And you can tell me you're so smooth When you make it go up, down, round and round Girl, oh you're so smooth When you make it go up, down, round and round Baby, you're so smooth When you make it go up, down, round and round Baby, up, down Round and round Up, down, round and round Girl, you got me all leading And me all needing I don't know if I should lean more to you Do you like it when I get a little close And put it back up and take it off And take it in, yeah Is it just the scenery of beautiful Between the eyes of the things that know what we can't uphold All we know, baby, is this a show and we're invited, yeah You're so smooth When you make it go up, down, round and round Baby, yeah You're so smooth When you make me go higher Than I've been before You're so smooth Up, down, up, down Left, right, left, right Up, up, down, down Left, right, left, right Yeah, select, stop In my heart Baby, that Double D bouncing in my heart Got the love to the front and the back You know it, I know it Come on, you're so smooth Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: Up, down, round and round girl
When you make it go up, down, round and round
When you make it go up, down, round and round
Making it go up, down, round, round
I see a baby there in the club
No one came with you, you wanna rub a dub
You say you're just single damn mingling
But I said, hey, come on
You could use me as a friend in your life
I got the game, you pack up the stripes
Bring a little bit of cheddar scraps there
And then maybe make a kitchen for me and we'll go there
I don't need you to be scared
There's no fear inside of me
You got a reason for me to stay right next to you
Now I take one look at the back
And you can tell me you're so smooth
When you make it go up, down, round and round
When you make it go up, down, round and round
When you make it go up, down, round and round
Girl, you got me all leading
I don't know if I should lean more to you
Do you like it when I get a little close
And put it back up and take it off
Is it just the scenery of beautiful
Between the eyes of the things that know what we can't uphold
All we know, baby, is this a show and we're invited, yeah
When you make it go up, down, round and round
When you make me go higher
Double D bouncing in my heart
Got the love to the front and the back
You know it, I know it
